[2026-02-05 18:47:39] ACTION ITEMID BARCODE PRICE X WEIGHT/QTY = FINALPRICE
[2026-02-05 18:47:41] INSERT 000717959 2030097003880 0038901 : 67000  x 0.388  = 25996
[2026-02-05 18:47:43] INSERT 000717960 2030387000010 0038166 : 40150  x 0.001  = 40.15
[2026-02-05 18:47:45] INSERT 000717961 1829887 1829887 : 267500  x 1  = 267500
